svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 998px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: SAP-101: クロスアカウント S3 + KMS — 3 箇所のポリシーを揃える必要

switch.text: SAP-101: クロスアカウント S3 + KMS — 3 箇所のポリシーを揃える必要

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(235, 241, 255), rgb(25, 30, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 72, 204), rgb(152, 163, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 63px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 制作アカウント (オブジェクト所有 + KMS)

switch.text: 制作アカウント (オブジェクト所有 + KMS)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 128px; height: 1px; padding-top: 168px; margin-left: 51px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #7AA116;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#7AA116, #61820b); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
① バケットポリシー
Principal:
arn:aws:iam::OPS:role/X
Action:
s3:GetObject
Resource: bucket/*

switch.text: ① バケットポリシー...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 168px; margin-left: 246px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 255px; margin-left: 242px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #DD344C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#DD344C, #ff7f93); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
② KMS キーポリシー
Principal:
arn:aws:iam::OPS:role/X
Action:
kms:Decrypt
kms:GenerateDataKey

switch.text: ② KMS キーポリシー...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 388px; height: 1px; padding-top: 425px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
・オブジェクトは SSE-KMS で暗号化
・カスタマー管理 KMS (CMK) 必須
(AWS 管理キーは別アカウントに共有不可)
・バケットポリシーで Get 許可だけでは
復号できない → KMS 側も必要

switch.text: ・オブジェクトは SSE-KMS で暗号化...

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 248, 232), rgb(22, 29, 15)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(122, 161, 22), rgb(97, 130, 11));

div.div:
③ 実行ロールの IAM ポリシー
Action:
s3:GetObject
kms:Decrypt
Resource:
arn:aws:s3:::PROD-bucket/*
arn:aws:kms:REGION:PROD:key/ID

switch.text: ③ 実行ロールの IAM ポリシー...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 512px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #DD344C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#DD344C, #ff7f93); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3 点セットが揃って初めて読み取り可能:
① バケットポリシー (PROD 側)
② KMS キーポリシー (PROD 側)
③ IAM ロールポリシー (OPS 側)
× どれか1つでも欠けると AccessDenied

switch.text: 3 点セットが揃って初めて読み取り可能:...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 130px; margin-left: 505px;

display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 415px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #8C4FFF; background-color: #ffffff;
